cmd: mkdir -p .agentic; printf '%s' '{"grill":{"enabled":true},"observability":{"enabled":true}}' > .agentic/config.json; out=$(jq -r '[(.grill.enabled // false), (.grill.deep // false)] | join(" ")' .agentic/config.json 2>/dev/null || echo "false false"); [ "$out" = "true false" ] && echo '{"parsed":"'"$out"'"}'
_note: a pre-deep-mode config entry (no .deep key) must read as enabled=true deep=false — backward compatibility with configs written before 0.4.0
